frame_analyses.description: Both graspers positioned above peg transfer board with 6 rubber objects on pegs
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Setup shows 3 orange and 3 green objects on left pegs, empty pegs on right

frame_analyses.description: Left grasper picking up green object from left peg
Green object being transferred from left grasper to right grasper in midair
Right grasper placing green object on right peg
Scene transitions to different task setup - Pattern Cut with circular gauze
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Video shows multiple FLS tasks sequentially

score_components.formula_applied: Task incomplete - only 1/6 objects transferred, no score assigned

confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of setup and initial transfer. Video appears to be instructional showing task demonstration rather than complete performance.
cannot_determine: Complete task performance - video transitions to different tasks after showing initial demonstration
technique_summary: Demonstrated portion shows excellent technique with smooth grasping, clean midair transfer, and controlled placement. However, this appears to be an instructional video showing only the beginning of the task.
improvement_suggestions: Complete full task sequence with all 6 objects
